note: The live MCP tools/list response is authoritative. Access is public with no API key or request quota. Preserve each translation's returned copyright metadata and honor the required hash cycle.

tools.name: list_translations
tools.purpose: Discover translations, copyright information, metadata, scope, and catalog hashes.

tools.name: list_books
tools.purpose: Discover numbered and localized book names and hashes.

tools.name: get_scripture
tools.purpose: Retrieve a complete translation, book, or chapter with a consistency-checked hash.

tools.name: query_verses
tools.purpose: Retrieve selected or grouped verses and participating chapter hashes.

tools.name: get_hash
tools.purpose: Retrieve one exact translation, book, or chapter hash.

tools.name: get_hash_manifest
tools.purpose: Retrieve bulk checksum data for an efficient scheduled sweep.

tools.name: check_for_updates
tools.purpose: Compare cached hashes and return required invalidation actions.
